data.title: Continuous Penetration Testing
data.description: Regular simulated attacks to identify and address vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated via tools such as Metasploit and Burp Suite.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Data encrypted throughout the entire transmission process.

data.title: Anomaly Detection Systems
data.description: Monitors and detects unusual patterns that suggest potential breaches.
data.technical_spec: Uses machine learning algorithms for real-time monitoring.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Policies and technologies to ensure that the right individuals access the correct resources.

data.title: Data Loss Prevention
data.description: Prevents sensitive data from being leaked outside the organization.
data.technical_spec: Implemented through network security protocols and regular audits.
